text:
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper exists exactly as cited. It appears on the ACL Anthology at the stated URL with the exact title "Bleu: a Method for Automatic Evaluation of Machine Translation," authored by Kishore Papineni, Salim Roukos, Todd Ward, and Wei-Jing Zhu, published in the Proceedings of the 40th Annual Meeting of the ACL in 2002. It is also confirmed on DBLP, Semantic Scholar, IBM Research, and other sources with fully matching metadata.
LINK: https://aclanthology.org/P02-1040/
